name: HMS HDML 1469 (ML 1469)
events: 5 Jun 1944 Crew training at HMS Christopher, Fort William. Captain of HDML1469 - T/Lt. George Beverley Forshaw RNVR Number Two - T/S.Lt. F. A. Dark RNVR Chief Engineer - Warrant Engineer James Allen RNVR. (1)
1 Jan 1945 HDML 1469 transferred to HMS Wildfire, Sheerness (1)
30 Jun 1945 HDML 1469 transferred to HMS Europa, Lowestoft. After the war HDML became Fast Despatch Boat FDB68 until sold on 9th September 1947. (1)
